# Testsigma Documentation

> Testsigma is a cloud-based, AI-powered test automation platform that enables teams to automate web, mobile, API, and desktop testing without deep coding expertise.

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://testsigma.com/docs/getting-started/)
- [Test Cases](https://testsigma.com/docs/test-cases/)
- [Test Plans](https://testsigma.com/docs/test-plans/)
- [Test Suites](https://testsigma.com/docs/test-suites/)
- [Elements](https://testsigma.com/docs/elements/)
- [Test Data](https://testsigma.com/docs/test-data/)
- [API Testing](https://testsigma.com/docs/api/)
- [Integrations](https://testsigma.com/docs/integrations/)
- [Agent](https://testsigma.com/docs/agent/)
- [Desired Capabilities](https://testsigma.com/docs/desired-capabilities/)
- [Addons](https://testsigma.com/docs/addons/)
- [Reports](https://testsigma.com/docs/reports/)
- [Continuous Integration](https://testsigma.com/docs/continuous-integration/)
- [Visual Testing](https://testsigma.com/docs/visual-testing/)
- [Salesforce Testing](https://testsigma.com/docs/salesforce-testing/)
- [Desktop Automation](https://testsigma.com/docs/desktop-automation/)
- [Troubleshooting](https://testsigma.com/docs/troubleshooting/)

## Sitemap
